title: NFT-Gated App Boilerplate
description: Complete Next.js boilerplate with wallet connect, SIWE authentication, and NFT ownership gating — deploy a token-gated product in under an hour.
useCase: Ship a token-gated product (Discord alternative, exclusive content site, holder dashboard) where access requires owning any NFT in a specific collection.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain where the NFT collection is deployed
keyParams.walletAddress: Wallet address of the user requesting access
keyParams.collectionContract: NFT collection contract address to check ownership against
